scenario_info.title: Lost Treasure Forest Dungeon
scenario_info.description: A legendary treasure slumbers deep in an ancient forest. Three adventurers brave the dangers and step into the dungeon.
scenario_info.backstory: An ancient forest near Harun Village. Rumors have long told of a legendary treasure sleeping deep within the forest. Three young adventurers who grew up in the village set out into the forest to find the treasure.

opening.new_game: New game start — begin with level 1 characters.
opening.narrative: The forest on the outskirts of Harun Village. The entrance to an ancient dungeon is faintly visible through the undergrowth. Three adventurers stand before the entrance, torches in hand.

default_party.description: Default party for new game start (level 1)

appearance.hair: Long silver-gray hair, loosely tied back
appearance.outfit: Navy blue robe, magical charm hanging from belt
appearance.notable: Always carrying a magic staff in hand

appearance.hair: Short black hair, swept to one side
appearance.outfit: Black leather armor, two daggers at the waist
appearance.notable: Moves as if melting into the shadows

appearance.face: Strong jawline, rough but dependable appearance
appearance.outfit: Chainmail armor, iron sword on back, leather shield on left arm

chapters.name: Forest Entrance
chapters.description: The path leading into the ancient forest. Trees are dense and little light gets through. Herbs and traps are scattered about.

chapters.name: Ancient Dungeon
chapters.description: A stone dungeon deep in the forest. Orcs and slimes inhabit it, with ancient inscriptions and hidden keys.

chapters.name: Treasure Room
chapters.description: The golden chamber at the dungeon's deepest point. A treasure chest rigged with poison gas traps and a guardian golem await.

chapters.name: Epilogue
chapters.description: After obtaining the treasure and escaping the dungeon. Return to the village and prepare for the next journey.

endings.title: Perfect Victory
endings.narrative: All three adventurers returned to the village alive with the legendary treasure.

endings.title: Pyrrhic Victory
endings.narrative: The treasure was obtained, but the cost was great.

endings.title: Escaped with Their Lives
endings.narrative: They abandoned the treasure and escaped the dungeon. Being alive is enough.
